name: amazon-deals
description: Custom MCP tool for amazon.com: findDeals reads Today's Deals and returns discounted products.

tools.name: findDeals
tools.description: Reads amazon.com's Today's Deals page and returns discounted products (title, price, discount, url). Self-contained: if the deals page isn't open it returns {status:"navigate_required", navigateTo} — open it with the navigate tool, then call again.

tools.name: finish
tools.description: Call when the task is complete. Pass a short result summary; its value is the final result.
